comments_critique.summary: The discussion centers on the availability and timeframe of NME magazine issues, with a user offering additional issues from a later period for free. The conversation is brief and primarily informative.

comments.author: Joeboy
comments.text: These end a few years before I started getting them. I have a large pile of NMEs and Melody Makers from I guess the late '80s / early '90s if anybody wants to collect them from East London, free to good home :-)
comments.analysis: The comment provides a personal account of magazine issues from a later period and offers them for free, which is plausible and adds value to the discussion.
